content.speakerText: Hi there! How can I help you today?
expectedAnswers: I need some running shoes, please.
I'm just browsing for now, thanks.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达购物意图或浏览态度
语言准确性：语法正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：使用口语化表达，语气自然不生硬
关键词覆盖：使用了running shoes / sneakers / browsing等场景词

content.speakerText: Awesome! What size do you usually wear?
expectedAnswers: I think I'm a 9, but I'm not sure.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：准确回应尺码信息，不回避问题
语言准确性：使用正确单位表达（size + 数字）
表达自然度：包含适当语气词（I think, but I'm not sure）体现真实口语
关键词覆盖：使用size / number / wear等关键词

content.speakerText: Welcome to FootFit! Can I help you find something today?
content.speakerTextCn: 欢迎光临FootFit！今天能帮您找点什么吗？
expectedAnswers: I need a pair of trail running shoes.
I'm not sure yet—I’ll take a look around.
Do you have any discounts on sneakers?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：回应符合店员服务语境，表达明确需求或态度
语言准确性：语法正确，用词得体，无中式英语
表达自然度：使用符合英语母语者习惯的表达方式
关键词覆盖：使用了running shoes / sneakers / discounts / look around等场景词
